title: Golden Syrup Mediterranean Cake
description: Moist and flavorful cake infused with the sweetness of golden syrup and the Mediterranean twist of herbs.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease two 8-inch round cake pans and line the bottoms with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, mediterranean herbs, bake powder, and salt.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together golden syrup and infused olive oil.
Add eggs one by one, whisking well after each addition.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans and smooth the tops.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pans for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
